Revlo helps eSports streamers better connect, engage, and monetize their fan base. 

Today, thousands of gamers are becoming online celebrities as they stream their video games to over 100 million fans all over the world. Yet, the only method for popular streamers to interact with their fans while streaming is in a cluttered IRC chat room. Revlo allows streamers to reward their loyal fans with recognition, merchandise, and interaction opportunities. Naturally, fans engage more, driving up repeat viewership and conversion into paid subscription on a streamer's channel.

name: ego
oneLiner: Character AI + Roblox :persistent, sapient AI characters in 3D worlds
longDescription:
Ego AI is building Character AI + Roblox. Our conviction is that 3D embodiment, shared activities in games and AI imbued with human-like personalities will solve the existing problems of low-stakes, shallow and generic interactions that impact retention in consumer AI chat experiences.  

We’re fine-tuning a foundation model for characters to behave in human-like ways—indistinguishable from real people—and building a UGC platform around it to allow users to create, experience and form meaningful connections & mutual stories with these AI characters. On our platform, simworld, users will be able place the characters in a Stardew Valley style simulated town, where the AI characters will live, work and play, leading rich internal lives. Users who deepen bonds with these AI character friends can invite them out with them to Discord, Minecraft or even a Netflix-n-chill session.

Our Character engine, ego AI, built on top of Unreal, will allow users to create, deploy and even monetize their characters across any surface that supports our CCProtocol. The first use case for our characters will likely be DnD-style roleplay, Minecraft RP, and Twitch streaming. 

Characters will always live and exist in Simtowns with other AIs (and humans) where they will all lead varied internal lives replete with conflict, danger, opportunity, and love…just like humans in the real world!

During YC, we used our engine to build TownWorld - a 3D interactive Twitch live stream of the Stanford generative agents paper (https://www.twitch.tv/townworld). To the best of our knowledge, it's the first ever AI 3D simulation of a small town in real time

YC Launch - https://www.ycombinator.com/launches/KeD-ego-an-ai-native-3d-simulation-engine-getting-us-closer-to-the-matrix-one-pixel-at-a-time

Demo video: https://docsend.com/view/mzf6i7kiwkkgg669

AI 3D TownWorld video: https://docsend.com/view/ig6t2shuz26z7wha

name: Vitable Health
oneLiner: Affordable care via ICHRA and primary care with visits, meds, labs…
longDescription:
If you're a YC company: Book Here! https://calendly.com/danielle-wimberly-vitablehealth/30min

We are a team of engineers, clinicians, and operators rethinking healthcare for startups and and SMB's. We make it simple for startups to offer ICHRA with built in direct primary care, including free virtual visits, over 1,000 prescriptions, and 40+ lab tests. Contributions are made with tax-free dollars, and we handle everything from onboarding to ongoing care so founders can stay focused on building.

We are backed by world class investors like First Round Capital, Cherryrock, Y Combinator, and SoftBank, along with incredible founders and operators including Michael Seibel (YC, Twitch), Immad Akhund (Mercury), Allison Pickens (Gainsight), Jack Altman (Lattice), Dan Folkman (GoPuff), and others.

name: Legionfarm
oneLiner: AI workspace for professional gamers
longDescription:
LegionFarm is the world's top AI-powered marketplace for gamers to hire elite pros (top 1%) for coaching, carry and companionship services in AAA games like WoW, Destiny 2, CoD, and Apex Legends. Founded in 2016, YC-backed (W20) with $17.8M from Twitch founders and investors, we've served 250k+ customers via two web platforms and five bots, creating 10k+ jobs for Pros worldwide.

We turn gaming hobbies into careers, delivering global entertainment and esports impact. Since 2023, our LLM-driven automation replaced 100+ ops roles, with an AI workspace featuring smart agents, real-time feedback, evals, and community fine-tuning for peak pro efficiency.

name: Hyper Online
oneLiner: Social avatar platform for VTubers
longDescription:
Hyper is an early stage startup with a mission to build the largest avatar platform in the world. We're starting by targeting consumer use-cases, and our first one is VTubing: an emerging type of content where creators use computer-vision and motion capture to pilot 3D avatars as content creation tools.

Avatar content (also known as VTubing) has broken into the multi-billion-view-per-month category on places like Twitch and YouTube. This has given a new group of people the power to tell stories and present themselves on their own terms online while also protecting their IRL identities.  Our goal is to build the largest platform tools for this new movement. We're now  the #1 US VTubing app on iOS. 

We also recently announced our seed funding: we're backed by Amazon, Two Sigma Ventures, MakersFund, YCombinator, and other great investors.

App Store: https://hyper.online/download
TechCrunch: https://techcrunch.com/2023/06/12/hyper-raises-3-6m-from-amazon-and-more-for-its-iphone-based-vtuber-friendly-avatar-platform/

longDescription:

T3.Chat - The best AI chat app
UploadThing - File uploads for full-stack developers
PicThing - Background removal for content creators

name: Fathom
oneLiner: Never take notes again with the #1 AI Meeting Assistant
longDescription: Instead of trying to hurriedly take notes while also having a conversation, you simply push a button in our app whenever you hear something important, like a piece of product feedback or action item. In real-time our system records, transcribes, and creates clips from the parts of the conversation you tagged that can share with your team or use to write post-call notes.

name: SlashAuth
oneLiner: The solution for fine-grained access control in web3
longDescription: Slashauth builds a developer platform for web3 enabled apps. Slashauth’s platform provides login functionality, role based access control, data storage, and more to any web3 enabled application.

name: Jam.gg (formerly Piepacker)
oneLiner: Jam.gg, play couch games online with friends
longDescription:
At the crossroads of online gaming and video chatting, jam.gg is a web platform to play awesome multiplayer games with your friends. Jam.gg focuses on hyper accessibility with a patented technology cutting the internet bandwidth requirement by 15 on average. Jam.gg features top retro, pc indie and board games.

The project branched out in two companies in 2023 with Jam on one side and Onibi (https://onibi.gg/) becoming its own company. YC being on both cap tables.

name: Instacart
oneLiner: Marketplace for grocery delivery and pickup
longDescription: Instacart is the North American leader in online grocery and one of the fastest-growing companies in e-commerce. Instacart’s same-day delivery and pickup services bring fresh groceries and everyday essentials to busy people and families across the U.S. and Canada in as fast as an hour. Since its founding in 2012, Instacart has become an essential service for millions of families, while also serving as an immediate, flexible earnings opportunity for hundreds of thousands of shoppers across North America.  The company partners with more than 350 retailers and delivers from more than 25,000 stores across more than 5,500 cities in North America. Today, Instacart is accessible to more than 85% of households in the U.S. and more than 70% of households in Canada.

name: Rappi
oneLiner: On-demand delivery and financial services for Latin America.
longDescription: Rappi is a mega high growth, Series B, consumer tech StartUp looking to be the everything store of Latin America. We are a marketplace that connects users who want to purchase prepared foods, groceries, clothes, and more with contractors who fulfil them. Think of Rappi as a Doordarsh meets Delivery meets Instacart. We are venture backed by top VCs in the world including Sequoia, DST, Andreessen Horrowitz and YCombinator. Management consultant skills are highly valued and one of the founders and three of the company's top leaders are former top tier management consultants. We are across Argentina, Brasil, Mexico, Colombia and are aggressively growing in these markets and all throughout LatAm.

name: Scale AI
oneLiner: Data-centric infrastructure to accelerate the development of AI
longDescription: Scale accelerates the development of AI within organizations of any size to deliver critical business insights and operational efficiency. Its data-centric infrastructure platform leverages RLHF (Reinforced Learning with Human Feedback) to help organizations build the strongest AI models that supercharge their business, with customers across industries including Meta, Microsoft, U.S. Army, DoD’s Defense Innovation Unit, Open AI, General Motors, Toyota Research Institute, Brex, Instacart and Flexport.

name: PgDog
oneLiner: Scaling engine for PostgreSQL
longDescription:
PgDog is an application for sharding PostgreSQL. It understands SQL and can distribute queries automatically between databases. It's built for managed databases, like AWS RDS, and doesn't require any changes to application code or schema.

In addition to sharding, PgDog is a load balancer and pooler, so it can act as a replacement for PgBouncer, RDS Proxy, and other Postgres scaling products. It brings the simplicity and performance of HTTP load balancing to the database.

Built from the experience of sharding Postgres at Instacart during peak growth in 2020, PgDog is the answer to the old question: does Postgres scale? It does now.

name: Wasp
oneLiner: Configuration language for building enterprise web apps 10x faster
longDescription:
Wasp is a simple configuration language for building enterprise web apps with less code and best practices. If a developer wants to build an app like Instacart, they need to know a dozen different technologies and how to make them work together - Wasp solves this problem while still letting developers use React, Node.js and their other favourite tools.

We will enable enterprises to build modern apps quickly at scale, like Databricks did for data management.

name: Mercator
oneLiner: AI-assisted data analytics
longDescription: Mercator is your AI-assisted data analytics platform for writing faster, cheaper, and smarter SQL. Co-founders Andrew and Dayton met on the Instacart data science team. Dayton earned a physics PhD at UC Berkeley before entering DS. Andrew spent six years as a SWE at Uber, where he developed pydeck, a geospatial data visualization library with over 12M downloads. Mercator is backed by Y Combinator, Tribe Capital, Soma Capital, Valor Equity Partners, Amplify Partners, and Rebel Fund.

name: Talentdrop
oneLiner: Your personal hiring page.
longDescription:
When it comes to hiring, there are lots of resources to help managers get more candidates. But on average, only 1 in every 300 of these candidates actually get hired. Hiring managers and recruiters end up taking a robotic, brute force approach to sourcing - the kind of approach top talent hates.

Managers are increasingly finding that the simplest and most personable way to attract talent starts with their network. The best candidates want to work for great people, not faceless companies. Sharing open roles on places like LinkedIn, Slack, and Twitter unlocks enormous potential for a personalized recruiting approach across a curated talent pool, but these referrals are difficult to track across platforms and end up lost in the shuffle. We are changing that.

After more than a decade building teams at high-growth consumer tech companies like Instacart, Snapchat, and Uber, Maddy Nguyen turned her attention to creating collaborative tools for hiring managers and recruiters to source candidates from a wider range of networks and communities - while staying human.

name: Tire Swing
oneLiner: AI Powered Affordable Housing Eligibility
longDescription:
Tire Swing uses AI to power resident and applicant eligibility evaluations for affordable housing.

Our software manages the resident certification and recertification process end-to-end for public and private properties supported by Project Based Rental Assistance, Low Income Housing Tax Credit, and Housing Vouchers. It serves as a drop-in replacement for third-party consultants and auditors, and helps compliance staff complete their work faster and more accurately.

name: Midship
oneLiner: AI for SOX testing
longDescription: Midship is rebuilding internal audit from the ground up. We're starting with SOX testing by building AI agents that perform audit work end to end, giving auditors leverage to focus on higher-value risk and advisory work.

name: Tandem
oneLiner: AI-native office leasing agent
longDescription:
The pandemic reduced office use nationwide by 50%, and tenants have been left to deal with highly inflexible, long term lease agreements that don’t fit today’s office use patterns.

The traditional brokerage model works great for big spaces and long terms. But when you want to talk smaller units, short term lengths, shared and common areas, you’re out of luck. 

Tandem is an AI-native office leasing platform. We’re using technology to unlock an easier leasing process.   Our AI co-pilot provides a white-glove-quality B2B office search experience, with a fraction of the human labor typically required.

Today we’re serving three primary markets — NY, SF and BOS.  We’ve helped more than 500 companies find great office space and have seen double-digit month-over-month growth.

name: Reprompt
oneLiner: AI Agents for Location
longDescription:
Reprompt builds AI Agents for Location-- Mapping companies like Radar and TomTom use our agents to get live information about a point of interest or business that keeps their maps up to date. 

To do this we have an internal agents platform that supports Web, Vision, Doc Reading, and soon self-driving browser agents.

name: Spine AI
oneLiner: Manage a swarm of AI agents to get real work done
longDescription:
Spine AI is a visual workspace where a single prompt spins up a swarm of AI agents that plan, delegate, and execute complex tasks together — with humans fully in the loop.

Instead of chatting back and forth with one model, Spine breaks work into visible steps on a shared canvas. Agents collaborate in parallel, ask clarifying questions, use connected tools, and show their reasoning and intermediate outputs as they work.

Every agent’s work stays inspectable, auditable, and editable — reducing hallucinations and giving you real control over the outcome.

Spine connects to leading AI models and your existing tools, but the real power comes from orchestration: you act as the team lead, Spine runs the swarm.

Chat is great for answers. Spine is built for execution.

name: SilkChart
oneLiner: AI Sales Assistant to increase playbook adoption and win more deals
longDescription: SilkChart analyzes sales calls and measures how well playbooks are executed. It proactively surfaces coaching opportunities to managers, and provides reps with actionable feedback to close more deals.

name: Moonvalley
oneLiner: Building the next generation AI creative studio
longDescription: We are building the next generation creative studio, powered by the most capable video and image foundational models. We are creating the place where generative image and video experiences will be built. Backed by Y-Combinator and Khosla Ventures.

name: Cortex
oneLiner: Cortex is the Internal Developer Portal eliminating “developer tax”…
longDescription: ​​Cortex is an internal developer portal built to accelerate the path to engineering excellence. Companies like Xero, Canva, and TripAdvisor use Cortex to catalog, score, and assign action to improve service quality and velocity, so devs can get back to work that drives the business forward.
